overview.description: The NuShares ETF Trust Nuveen International Aggregate Bond ETF (NXUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Global Aggregate ex-USD index. The fund tracks an investment-grade, non-USD-denominated bond index, hedged against currency fluctuations for US investors. NXUS was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by Nuveen.
